languages.text: "Янур, эта тварь — моя добыча. Моя слава. И мой вызов. И ничем из этого я не собираюсь делиться с теми, кто смотрел на меня с недоверием".
"Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."
languages.original_text: "Янур, эта тварь — моя добыча. Моя слава. И мой вызов. И ничем из этого я не собираюсь делиться с теми, кто смотрел на меня с недоверием".

traits.locale_text: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."
"Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."
"Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."

languages.text: 「ジャヌール、この生き物は私の獲物。私の栄光。そして私の挑戦。そして、私を疑いの目で見てきた者には、それを分け与えるつもりはない」
languages.original_text: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."

traits.locale_text: 「ジャヌール、この生き物は私の獲物。私の栄光。そして私の挑戦。そして、私を疑いの目で見てきた者には、それを分け与えるつもりはない。」

languages.text: "Janur, bu yaratık benim avım. Benim şanım. Benim sınavım. Bunu, bana güvensizlikle bakan kimseyle paylaşmaya niyetim yok."
languages.original_text: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."

traits.locale_text: "Janur, bu yaratık benim avım. Benim şanım. Benim sınavım. Bunu, bana güvensizlikle bakan kimseyle paylaşmaya niyetim yok."

languages.text: «Janur, esta criatura es mi presa, mi gloria y mi desafío. No tengo intención de compartirla con quienes han desconfiado de mí».
languages.original_text: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."

traits.locale_text: «Janur, esta criatura es mi presa, mi gloria y mi desafío. No tengo intención de compartirla con quienes han desconfiado de mí».

languages.text: “雅努尔，那是属于我的猎物，我的荣耀，我的挑战。我不打算和对我心存疑虑的人分享这些。”
languages.original_text: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."

traits.locale_text: “雅努尔，那是属于我的猎物，我的荣耀，我的挑战。我不打算和对我心存疑虑的人分享这些。”

languages.text: « Janur, cette créature est ma proie. Ma gloire. Mon défi. Je n'ai pas l'intention de partager ce moment avec ceux qui ne m'ont accordé que leur méfiance. »
languages.original_text: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."

traits.locale_text: « Janur, cette créature est ma proie. Ma gloire. Mon défi. Je n'ai pas l'intention de partager ce moment avec ceux qui ne m'ont accordé que leur méfiance. »

languages.text: "Janur, diese Kreatur ist meine Beute. Mein Ruhm. Meine Herausforderung. Und ich habe nicht vor, sie mit jemandem zu teilen, der mir gegenüber misstrauisch war."
languages.original_text: "Janur, this creature is my prey. My glory. And my challenge. And I do not plan to share any of it with those who have looked upon me with distrust."

traits.locale_text: "Janur, diese Kreatur ist meine Beute. Mein Ruhm. Meine Herausforderung. Und ich habe nicht vor, sie mit jemandem zu teilen, der mir gegenüber misstrauisch war."
